creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
This is a multi-part message in MIME format.
 --------------060902040609060007060604
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1; format=flowed
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 
  >Submitter-Id:  current-users
  >Originator:    Peter Thoenen <peter.thoenen@yahoo.com>
  >Confidential:  no
  >Synopsis:      update games/ftjava
  >Severity:      non-critical
  >Priority:      low
  >Category:      ports
  >Class:         maintainer-update
  >Release:       FreeBSD 7.0-BETA1 amd64
  >Environment:
  >Description:
          Update to current release; hopefully soon enough to get in 6.2 
 and 7.0
 
 --------------060902040609060007060604
 Content-Type: text/plain;
  name="ftjava.diff.txt"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 Content-Disposition: inline;
  filename="ftjava.diff.txt"
 
 diff -ruN ftjava.orig/Makefile ftjava/Makefile
 --- ftjava.orig/Makefile	2007-10-30 09:08:03.699253422 -0400
 +++ ftjava/Makefile	2007-10-30 10:24:15.231836753 -0400
 @@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
  # $FreeBSD: ports/games/ftjava/Makefile,v 1.6 2007/10/23 14:10:58 miwi Exp $
  
  PORTNAME=	ftjava
 -PORTVERSION=	1.2.1
 +PORTVERSION=	1.3
  CATEGORIES=	games java
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.warpfish.com/davisje/:file1 \
  		http://home.nycap.rr.com/davisje/ftjava/:doc1
 @@ -28,7 +28,7 @@
  DATADIR=	${JAVASHAREDIR}/${PORTNAME}
  DATAFILES=	Images IncomingGames OutgoingGames Ships FTJava.jar \
  		activation.jar imap.jar log4j-1.2.7.jar mail.jar \
 -		mailapi.jar png.jar pop3.jar smtp.jar xerces.jar \
 +		mailapi.jar png.jar pop3.jar skeetutil.jar smtp.jar xerces.jar \
  		xercesImpl.jar xmlParserAPIs.jar
  
  .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
